title: Deliciously Buttery Portuguese Tofu Skillet
description: A vegan friendly Portuguese dish featuring sweet sherry and binchotan charcoal, perfect for a weeknight dinner

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the vegan butter in a large skillet over medium heat until melted and foamy
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant
Add the cubed tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides
Add the sweet sherry and bring to a simmer
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 5 minutes until the liquid has reduced slightly
Stir in the binchotan charcoal powder if using
Add the paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot
